items.title: South Korea's president raises prospect of a 'Trump Tower' in North Korea
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Visiting South Korean president Lee Jae Myung raises prospect of a Korean "Trump Tower" and golf in North Korea as he asks President Donald Trump "for your role in establishing peace on the Korean Peninsula." 

#trump #southkorea 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: A day covering the White House with AP video journalist
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump hosted Lee Jae Myung, the new president of South Korea, at the White House on Monday. AP video journalist Dan Huff detailed a day covering the event at the White House.

#whitehouse #trump #korea #leejaemyung</article>

items.title: Trump on his relationship with Kim Jong Un: 'Know him better than anybody'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>At two White House events Monday — including during a meeting with South Korean President Lee Jae Myung — President Donald Trump repeatedly praised North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un, saying he knows him “better than anybody” and hopes to meet with him “this year.” 

#trump #northkorea #kimjongun 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: Pam Bondi speaks after Mexican drug lord Ismael ‘El Mayo’ Zambada pleads guilty in US
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Watch live as Attorney General Pam Bondi holds a press conference after former Mexican cartel kingpin Ismael “El Mayo” Zambada pleaded guilty Monday to U.S. drug trafficking charges.</article>

items.title: Trump moves to ban flag burning despite Supreme Court ruling allowing it
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump signed an executive order requiring the Justice Department to investigate and prosecute people for burning the American flag, an activity that the U.S. Supreme Court has ruled is legitimate political expression protected by the U.S. Constitution. 

#trump 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: AP freelancer Mariam Dagga among 5 journalists killed in Israel strikes in Gaza
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Israeli strikes on a hospital in southern Gaza killed five journalists Monday, according to health officials, including one who days earlier had reported for The Associated Press on children being treated for starvation at the same facility.

#israel #gaza 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.content:
<article>Watch live as President Donald Trump holds a bilateral meeting with South Korean President Lee Jae Myung in the Oval Office.

items.title: 'Leave our kids alone,' DC mayor says as parents worry about immigration crackdown at schools
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>On the first day of school in Washington D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser said she sympathized with immigrant parents who may be keeping their children home for fear of being detained or arrested by ICE agents. (AP Video: Mike Pesoli/Nathan Ellgren).

#trump #washingtondc

<article>Watch live as SpaceX launches the tenth test flight of its mega rocket Starship from the Starbase launch site in Boca Chica, Texas.

Credit: SpaceX
#spacex #space #starship #live</article>

items.title: Funeral held for Mariam Dagga, AP freelancer in Gaza who was killed in Israel strike
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Mourners on Monday wept and the prayed over the body of freelance journalist Mariam Dagga after she was among five journalists killed by Israeli strikes on southern Gaza’s main hospital. Dagga regularly reported for multiple outlets from the Nasser Hospital in Khan Younis, including a recent story for The Associated Press on doctors struggling to save children from starvation. (AP video: Samaher Abu Farhana).

#gaza #israel 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: ‘I'm not a dictator’: Trump responds to critics of his DC crackdown
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump says he’s "not a dictator" as he responds to critics decrying his crackdown in Washington. Speaking in the Oval Office Trump told reporters: “A lot of people are saying, 'Maybe we like a dictator.'"

#trump 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Kilmar Abrego Garcia hugs his wife before being detained by ICE
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Kilmar Abrego Garcia has been detained by immigration authorities in Baltimore and faces possible efforts by the Trump administration to deport him to Uganda. (AP video: Tassanee Vejpongsa).

items.title: Indonesia police fire tear gas as thousands try to reach parliament compound
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Indonesian riot police shot multiple rounds of tear gas at thousands of stone-throwing students who attempted to reach the parliament compound in Jakarta to protest the lavish allowances of its members. The demonstrators are enraged by recent reports that 580 members of the House of Representatives had been receiving a housing allowance of 50 million rupiah ($3,075) per month since September 2024. (AP video: Andi Jatmiko).

#indonesia 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Indonesia launches mass measles vaccination in East Java after deadly outbreak
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hundreds of children in a kindergarten waited for measles shots on Monday as Indonesian authorities rolled out a mass vaccination campaign in East Java province. The campaign came in response to an outbreak that has infected over 2,000 children and caused 17 to die in the past eight months. (AP video/Trisnadi)

#indonesia #measles 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>
